reason: Successfully executed GitHub username lookup using agent tools, granted account access, and verified response includes GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260421-005344-172p" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened with status "idle".
Verified agent status is "idle" — Confirmed agent status indicator shows "idle".
Clicked message input field — Input field became active and focused.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message appeared in input field.
Clicked Send button — Message was submitted, agent transitioned to "working" status, and session "GitHub Identity Verification Request" was created.
Waited for account request card — Account access request card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?"
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account was granted access, agent resumed processing.
Waited for API request review — API request review dialog appeared asking to allow "GET /user" request.
Clicked "Allow Once" button — Permission was granted for the API call.
Waited for final response (up to 4 minutes) — Agent completed processing with response "Your GitHub username is yiw190." after 1m 19s.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly displays username "yiw190".
Took screenshot of response — Screenshot captured showing complete interaction with GitHub username in response.
